goblin: lean goblin with sharp ears and wiry frame, sallow green skin
skeleton: animated skeleton with exposed bone structure, hollow eye sockets
orc: broad-shouldered orc with tusks and heavy brow
kobold: small draconic humanoid with scaled snout and pointed ears
zombie: shambling undead with torn flesh and sunken eyes
bugbear: burly goblinoid with shaggy fur, heavy brow, long arms
bandit: scruffy humanoid with weathered gear and wary expression
wolf: lean wolf with thick fur and alert gaze
